title: invalid_mod.jar
body:
# invalid_mod.jar
### _** LOUD SOUND WARNING!!!**_


**invalid_mod.jar** is a semi-horror, story mod where the game **world isn't just a sandbox** anymore - **it's** a volatile, reacting **mechanism**. Unlike traditional horror mods, it operates on a principle of non-intervention: it will not disturb your gameplay until you cross the line and make your first choice.

A **mod that was not meant to be found**. Its presence **in your world is an anomaly**. The environment will... react. Structures of ambiguous purpose will manifest, composed of familiar materials in unsettling arrangements. Their ignition requires unorthodox methods.

**Follow the instructions** and **you will achieve "success"**. The fragments you collect **are not loot; they are clues**. Entities may provide guidance, but their definitions of **"assistance" are subjective**.

------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
- _The 8-Minute Horizon: You are given a brief window of absolute normalcy in the Overworld. Gather resources, build tools, and prepare. When the time expires, the world will freeze, forcing you into the Interface of Choice. There is no turning back._
------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
### Credits & Development Team
**Lead Developer / Concept Creator:** adsw_studios / skycorrupt

**Lead Texture Artist & Visuals:** 🌌SFTW🌌

**QA & Master Beta-Testing Group:** ️Miracle & Gad
